title: Paperlands
description:
Paperlands is a cozy 2D puzzle adventure set in a handcrafted papercraft world where nothing works until it has color.

As you explore, you’ll unlock new colors and help the people of Paperlands finish what was left undone.

Note: The game is designed to be completed in a couple of hours, though playtime may vary depending on how quickly you solve the puzzles.

Bring the world to lifeSometimes any color will do the trick, sometimes a specific color is needed.

Solve puzzlesTake on a mix of traditional and environmental puzzles with increasing difficulties.

Explore a handcrafted papercraft worldColoring is the key, figuratively and literally.

Color the world to your likingIf you ever feel stuck, take a pause and enjoy coloring the world how you like.

Help the peopleEach character with their own request keeps the world unfolding.

Key features• Color the objects and people to be able to interact with them

• Solve both traditional and environmental puzzles

• Figure out what color goes where to be able to move forward

• Travel through cozy environments inspired by real paper art.

• No rush - take your time and enjoy exploring and solving puzzles at your own pace.

• Meet the people of Paperlands and help them finish what was started.
description_short: Nothing works until it has color. Unlock new colors, solve puzzles and bring a handcrafted papercraft world to life.
